Hero.title: Trade — Earn Rebates — Withdraw to Your Wallet
Hero.description: Zentrix standardizes the rebate flow from your broker directly to your wallet. Fully on-chain transparent. No hidden intermediaries.

connect.title: Connect Your Broker
connect.description: Sign up for a Zentrix account, complete KYC, and link your trading account (MT4/MT5).

trade.title: Trade as Usual
trade.description: Keep trading on your broker as normal. Zentrix automatically records your volume and calculates your rebates.

receive.title: Receive Rebates to Your Wallet
receive.description: Rebates are allocated to your ledger, confirmed after each settlement period, and you can claim them to your BEP20 wallet at any time.

transparency.title: On-chain Transparency
transparency.description: A public smart contract Pool. Every claim transaction has a tx hash verifiable on the block explorer.

multiBroker.title: Multi-Broker Support
multiBroker.description: Connect multiple brokers under one account. All rebates consolidated in one place.

referral.title: Clear Referral Network
referral.description: F1/F2/F3 referral tree with publicly visible rates. No hidden fees, no secret allocations.

withdrawals.title: Easy Withdrawals
withdrawals.description: Claim to your BEP20 wallet with a fixed $0.50 fee per withdrawal. No manual approval required.

ReferralNetwork.title: Referral Network
ReferralNetwork.subtitle: Earn commissions from people you refer and their network

f1.title: F1 — Direct Referrals
f1.description: X% rebate from their trading volume

f2.title: F2 — Second Level
f2.description: Y% rebate from their trading volume

f3.title: F3 — Third Level
f3.description: Z% rebate from their trading volume

example.title: Example
example.description: Your F1 trades 100 lots/month → you earn ~$XX in rebates from F1, regardless of whether F1 refers anyone else.

ReferralNetwork.legalNote: Commissions are derived from actual trading fees — not from selling participation packages or depositing funds into the system.

transparency.traditional: Internal balance, hard to verify externally

alex.name: Alex N.
alex.quote: I never knew if I was getting the right rebate rate before. Zentrix shows me every single allocation with its status. It's a completely different level of trust.

sarah.name: Sarah T.
sarah.quote: Connected my broker and the rebates just showed up automatically. Withdrawal was fast, fees were clear. No need to ask anyone anything.

whatIsRebate.question: What is a rebate and where does it come from?
whatIsRebate.answer: A rebate is a portion of the trading fee (spread/commission) that your broker returns through Zentrix. This money comes from your actual trading volume — not from any other source.

howMuchCost.question: How much does Zentrix charge?
howMuchCost.answer: Zentrix charges a platform fee of $0.50–$1.00 per lot traded (varies by broker and asset) and a fixed withdrawal fee of $0.50 per claim. There are no other hidden fees.

isKycRequired.question: Is KYC required?
isKycRequired.answer: Yes. KYC is mandatory to withdraw funds, in order to comply with AML regulations and protect your account. The process involves uploading a government-issued ID and a selfie — typically processed within a few business hours.

isPoolSafe.question: What is the on-chain Pool? Is my money safe?
isPoolSafe.answer: The Pool is a BEP20 smart contract that holds rebate liquidity. Funds enter the Pool only after broker payouts have been received by treasury and verified through 3-way reconciliation. You can check the Pool balance and full claim history directly on BSCScan.

howLongReceive.question: How long does it take to receive my rebates?
howLongReceive.answer: Rebates are recorded as your trading volume comes in. After each settlement period (typically weekly or monthly depending on the broker), rebates are confirmed and opened for claiming. You can claim at any time after that.

isMlm.question: Is Zentrix an MLM scheme?
isMlm.answer: No. Referral commissions come from the actual trading fees generated by people you refer — not from selling participation packages or requiring deposits. Zentrix does not require you to purchase anything to participate.

multipleBrokers.question: Can I connect multiple brokers?
multipleBrokers.answer: Yes. You can link multiple broker accounts under a single Zentrix account. Rebates from all brokers are consolidated in one place.

FinalCta.title: Start Earning Rebates From Your Trades
FinalCta.subtitle: Free to sign up · Fast KYC · Connect your broker in 5 minutes

Footer.tagline: Trade — Earn Rebates — Withdraw to Your Wallet
Footer.disclaimer: Zentrix is a rebate platform connecting traders and brokers. Rebates are derived from actual trading fees. Zentrix does not guarantee investment returns. Forex and derivative trading involves significant risk. Please ensure compliance with the regulations applicable in your jurisdiction before participating.

NotFound.title: Lost in Trade?
NotFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist. Let's get you back to the home page so you can start earning rebates.
